# Elytra Tweaks
This is a simple mod that adds automatic replacement of eliters in certain situations, replacing their textures within the game and more.
## Features:
- Automatically equips elytra when the player is in the air.
- Automatically replaces elytra with chestplate when the player is holding a mace (1.21+)
- Automatically replaces broken elytra with new ones.
- Displays a warning when elytra's durability becomes low.
## Configuration:
In the mod is inherent configuration, with the ability to partially disable the functionality of the mod and customize it.

![Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qa45epQv/images/d3ce21e2930bf030a81a9d3f4d382c96aaf142e8_350.webp)
## Possible problems in the update:
Due to code updates and the addition of the client side, there may be an unsynchronization and flying Elytra Swap with Elytra Swap enabled will become unavailable. How to fix it:
1. Disable the Elytra Swap feature.
2. Move the bib and eliters between slots.
3. Put the eliters back on.
4. Enable the Elytra Swap feature.
## What will be added in the next updates:
### 2.0.0 “PVE & Swap Update”:
A feature will be added, thanks to which it will be possible to use Elytra Swap on many servers, where it was forbidden before by disabling the functionality of the mod during PVP (configurable in the config)
### 2.1.0 "A world of textures without capes"
Added the ability to install elytra any texture by renaming on anvil.
## Usage on servers:
This mod is not a cheat, however Elytra Swap and Elytra Swap on Mace may be banned on some servers. Check the server rules before using this functionality.
**_You can disable this functionality in the mod settings!_**
